name: Australian United Investment Company Limited
analysis: AUI has reclaimed its short-term moving averages — the 9 has crossed up through the 26 and price is back above both. It is coming off a base, 4% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Trade idea: entry A$11.0400, stop A$10.4148, target A$12.9156 (3.00:1) — then trail it.
